task: graph representation learning for classification, generation, and recommendation
input: graph-structured data (e.g., user-item interaction graphs, molecular graphs)
output: graph representations, generated graphs, or ranked item recommendations
backbone: multiple: GMeCo (meta-learning contrastive), MM-FGCN (multiresolution framelet GCN), GSDM (spectral diffusion), GNN+Transformer (multi-view sequential)
loss: contrastive loss (InfoNCE) for GMeCo; reconstruction loss for GSDM; BPR or cross-entropy for recommendation
key_idea: introduces four distinct frameworks: meta-contrastive augmentation, multiresolution framelet convolution, spectral diffusion generation, and multi-view GNN-Transformer fusion
